ratings.comment: Very difficult class. I think Prof. Alberto is great and he is very passionate about the topics. The class is just too hard and there is a lot to remember and understand. Exams were not too difficult. I barely spend anytime on this class and was able to get an AB. HWs were very difficult and I would recommend spend a lot of time studying.
He uses slides to give lectures. Sometimes too fast and sometimes too slow. Assignments are hard but you can work in group. Exams are easier than homework.

Prof. Del Pia provides great intuition for proofs that are actually quite deep and difficult to understand. He is very encouraging of asking questions in class, and responds to all of them in great detail, no matter how basic. It's a pity that the pandemic turned the second half of this class online but it was still great!
Nice guy, but stay far, far, away from his classes if you don't like doing mathematical proofs.

Very kind, easygoing guy. Homeworks are very manageable and instructive, it's the exams that really get ya. Alberto cares deeply about the subject matter and the course, and he is an excellent professor to have.
